workflow.step2_hypotheses: Bearish for stocks (tariff crash context), per-question for FRED
workflow.step3_abel_api: observe_predict for 116 tickers, markov_blanket for 10 macro nodes
workflow.step4_verify: Abel direction checked against base predictions
workflow.step5_web_search: Confirmed April 2025 tariff crash, 62% stocks down, Fed cutting rates
workflow.step6_synthesize: Contrarian Abel flip at threshold -0.004 for stocks; economic reasoning for FRED
